raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta fakta tas KUNGA:
Jums ne buhs zeltees/ un Kaṙṙā
eet prett juhfeem Brahteem/teem
Israëka Behrneem: Greeseetees
atpakkat ikkatrs fawa Weetâ/
jo fchi Leeta irr no mannim no-
tikufi: Un tee klaustija ta KUN-
GA Wahrdam/ un greesahs at-
pakkat/ ka tee no-eetu pelz ta
KUNGA Wahrdru.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jerobeams ustaifija
Sikemu us Cewraima Kalnu/
un dsihwoja tur/ un isgahje no
turrenes/ un ustaifija Pnnelu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jerobeams dohmaja
fawa Sirdi/ nu nahks ta Wal-
stiba attak pee Dahwida Naina.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ja fchee Laudis us aug-
fehu ees Jerusalemtē/ eekfch ta
KUNGA Namna uppureht/
tad greesitees attak tcho Lanschu
Sirds pee fawu Kungu peeReka-
beamu / to Kehnimu no Juhda/
ir tee manni nokans/ un greesifees
attak pee Rekabeamu/to Kehni-
nu no Juhda.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz turreja tas Rek-
nisch Runnas/ un darrija diwi
Tettus no Selta/ un fazzija us
teem: Tas buhs jums pahrlee-
fu us Jerusalemi eet/ redsi/tche
irr tawi Deewi Israëls/ kas tew
no Egiptes-Sennes iswedduchi/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥsch likke weenu
Betelê/ un to ohtru Dannā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un fchi Leeta tappe par
Brehku/ jo tee Laudis gahje pee
weenu uhs Dannu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥsch darrija arrid
weenu Nammu to Augstu-
un darrija Preesterns no t
wiꞥsfemmakeem Laudim/ ka
Leewja Namma ne bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Jerobeams tur
Swchtkus astotā Mehnefi p
tāpadefiniā Mehnes Deenā
patt ka tohs Swchtkus/kas ee
Juhda bija/ un uppureja us
Altari. Ta patt darrija wi-
Betelê teem Telteem upp
dams/fo wiꞥsch bij darrijs/wi-
darrija arridsan Betelê Pre-
rus pee teem Augstumeem/
wiꞥsch bij darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥsch uppureja us
Altari/ fo wiꞥsch Betelê bij
tijs/ peektāpadefiniā Met
Deenā/astotā Mehnefi/fo wi-
bij fawa pascha Sirdi ts-
majs/ ta darrija wiꞥsch teem
fraëka Behrneem Swchtkus
uppureja us to Altari five-
nadams.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
